title: Add depth sweep for memory/ownership/region forms (with-region, owned, move, borrow, shared, weak-ref)
goal: Filed by the P6 depth-coverage auditor (docs/DEPTH_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md). These six composable special forms nest lexically (e.g. with-region inside with-region, owned wrapping owned) but NO P6 depth-parametric pillar currently owns them, so a depth-dependent miscompile in region/arena scoping or linear-ownership tracking (double-free, stale arena pointer at depth N, borrow escaping N scopes) would be invisible — the exact ESH-0117 blind-spot class. Add a depth d=1..N sweep that nests each form and differential-verifies (JIT/AOT/O0/O2) plus checks no leak/double-free (arena scope discipline) at each depth. Most natural home: extend the P6c nesting generator (test/nesting-depth-parametric) with a memory-forms category, or a dedicated small generator. On landing, set pillar for these ops in scripts/depth_coverage_registry.json (drop the gap_task) so the gate credits them.
acceptance: each of with-region/owned/move/borrow/shared/weak-ref nested to depth N is differential-clean and leak/double-free-free per depth
registry updated: the six ops carry a pillar (not a gap_task); scripts/check_depth_coverage.py coverage rises accordingly
